body: Hi Larry, are you free to shoot our wedding on October 17? Venue is Myers Park.
Yes, October 17 is currently open. I'll send a wedding quote and contract for you to review.
The download link for our gallery expired before we grabbed the high-res files.
Sorry about that - I've generated a fresh gallery download link with a 30-day expiry. Check your inbox.
Wed like to order a 16x20 framed print of frame #214 from our session.
Got it - a 16x20 framed print of frame #214 is $245 shipped. I'll send a payment link to confirm the order.
Rosewood needs updated headshots for 8 agents this quarter.
Happy to help with team headshots. I offer on-location corporate sessions; I'll send pricing for an 8-person package.
Could you resend the PDF invoice for our engagement shoot?
No problem - I've resent the PDF invoice for your engagement shoot to your email.
Booking event coverage for the fall corporate gala, 5-10pm.
Happy to cover the gala. I'll put together a 5-hour event coverage quote and send it over.
What are your rates for a 90-minute engagement session in NoDa?
My 90-minute engagement session in NoDa is $450 and includes 50+ edited images. I'll email full details.
We need to move our maternity session to the following weekend.
No problem moving your maternity session to the following weekend - I'll send a couple of new time options.
Considering a small ceremony near Asheville - do you travel?
Yes, I travel for weddings - Asheville is well within range. Travel is a flat add-on; I'll send the breakdown.
Whats the usual delivery window after the shoot?
Typical turnaround is 2-3 weeks for fully edited galleries, with sneak peeks within 48 hours.
Can we add a second shooter for our reception?
Yes, a second shooter is available as an add-on for your reception. I'll add it to the quote.
Queen City Brews wants product/lifestyle shots for our spring menu.
Sounds great - I'll put together a half-day brand shoot quote for your spring menu launch.
Looking to book a fall family session, golden hour.
Golden hour family sessions at Freedom Park are some of my favorites. I'll send fall availability.
Quick question about the model release in the contract.
Good question - the model release just lets me display the photos in my portfolio. Happy to walk through it.
